calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-17-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-17-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Deborah Neville.
Steve Littman, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: The John Stewart Co.,
Plaintiff's Witness: Willie Stevens, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Loretta Savoy.
Exhibit 1 - Rental Agreement-------------------ID/EVID
Exhibit 2 - Three-day Notice-------------------ID/EVID
Exhibit 3 - Incident Reports-------------------ID/EVID
After hearing the tetimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Loretta Savoy as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the property located at 333 Taylor St., 4, San Francisco.
Back-Rent and Damages $566.72
Costs $195.00, for a Total of $761.72.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits and Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-12-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: MERCEDES GAVIN FOR PLAINTIFF THE JOH STEWART COMPANY
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT LORETTA SAVOY

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. TO PROCEED TO TRIAL.

JUDGE:OLLIE MARIE-VICTOIRE; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; NOT REPORTED (218)
